event: Polyptych of San Vincenzo Ferreri — scene of miracles or martyrdom
symbols: Saint in red robes gesturing — the miraculous power working through the saint
Collapsed building — disaster from which divine intervention rescues the faithful
People in distress — those saved by the saint's intercession
description: A panel from a polyptych showing a dramatic scene: figures amid the rubble of a collapsed or damaged building. A man in red robes stands at center, gesturing or reaching toward the scene. Below, figures are trapped or emerging from debris. An observer leans from a window above. The scene is set against architectural elements of a medieval city. The painting uses warm earth tones with reds and browns.
